transcript.text:
(The bossam does not look ordinary...)
(The bossam that protects Changdeokgung...)
(A bunch)
Soybean paste stew
and oysters
So exciting
(No way)
(We thought so too, but this person eats very well....)
(She'll clean it all up once again)
Hello, everyone
Today
(Line 3) I'm near Anguk Station
After a long while, I came here to eat bossam* *Napa wraps with pork
This place is very popular to the locals here,
so there's a line during lunch too
Uh, right now,

(A load of customers even after lunch time...!) there shouldn't be customers but I think there are quite a few
(I had forgotten about oysters this winter...) I still haven't eaten oysters this winter
So I'm here to eat oyster bossam today!
("Cheonha Bossam" located next to Changdeokgung Palace) Here
("Cheonha Bossam" located next to Changdeokgung Palace) The name "Cheonha Bossam" makes it sound delicious already
(Enters the store) Hello
(Various dishes other than bossam)
They have fresh oysters!
Bossam set...
7 of them, please
And one fresh oyster
(Shakes head...)
- You don't think she can eat it, right? - (Flinch)
(Bossam's arrived) Thank you, wow, it looks delicious
So exciting
(Can't resist, digs right in!!) Bon appétit, everyone, I'll dig right in

The meat is quite unique in that
(Bossam is cut roughly, like it's no big deal) it's roughly cut...and how do I say this?
It's cut irregularly like this
(That's even better) But it makes it look more appetizing, doesn't it?
There's a lot of shredded radish in the kimchi
Place it on top
(Crazy)
Wow!!!
Wow, it's so good...!
How could it be this good...?
What kind of taste is this?!
(Full of flavors that she's even doubting herself...!) What kind of flavor is this? It's no joke!
Wow, it's so good!
Wow
I don't know if that unique flavor is from the meat
or from the kimchi

But it's sweet and really....
flavorful, I can smell something good
But the kimchi's a little spicy, it's spicy but very good
The flavor is from the kimchi!
I love that sweetness
(Hi) There's oysters inside
The meat is very soft....!
Oh, the kimchi's sweet!
It's sweet in a delicious way
A big wrap
(What is this taste?)
Rather than that artificial sweetness,
(Sweetness from veggies...!) it's that sweetness when you eat cabbage
(Didn't know oysters came with the dish...) Maybe I shouldn't have ordered fresh oysters if these are here
The soup is good too
Soybean paste stew?

To the rice
(Big)
Place meat on top
(+ Kimchi)
(Applause)
The meat is so tender
and very oily...
So it's very savory
I'll pack the leftover oysters to-go!
Still, just one fresh oyster
on top!
They have steamed eggs
The steamed eggs is so good!
I'll pack the oysters and kimchi to-go
and eat bossam at home again
Seriously, the kimchi's so good

Should I just eat the meat alone?
(Happiness to the MAX)
(Turns out this is a delicious kimchi restaurant...!) Here, the kimchi is the stroke of genius!
Should I move everything here and eat it?
It's like
a semi-dried octopus
(Seasoned octopus that is similar to seasoned squid)
It's good!
To here,
it'll be delicious if you add meat on top too
Octopus!
I think it'll go well together
It's good, hehe
This time, the seasoned cabbage!
(They have delicious seasoning...!) They make delicious seasoning
(Not one seasoning tastes bad...!) The kimchi seasoning is good, this is good, and this is really good!

It's so good!
I mean,
the kimchi is really good
But it's so delicious with the seasoned cabbage!
I'll place seasoned octopus on top
(Seasoned cabbage wins against kimchi) I should be eating the kimchi
(Scared)
(The amount of food makes her back away...)
(Eat lots) Enjoy your food
Oh, okay, hehe, thank you!
To the kimchi,
this octopus texture is so chewy,
so it's good to eat together!
(Huge oyster clump...!) The oyster is very big too
(Cannot escape the charms of the soybean paste stew) Why's the soup so addictive?
I can't stop getting sips of it!

To the soup....
Should I dampen this and eat it?!
(Sploosh)
Place it on top
Kimchi
One garlic
Mmm, it's good! (Probably what she's saying)
Mmm
(Nonchalantly gives additional seasoned cabbage)
Ohh, thank you!!
Seasoned cabbage this time!
Why did it get on me...?
(Culprit)
(He can't even eat it but got it on him...) You didn't even eat it and got it on you, how unfair LOL
(Dishwashing soap)
(Couldn't doubt due to being too confident) Producer, did you have some secretly?

To the rice!
meat!
Actually, there are different sizes of bossam
There's medium and a large
(Fun of clearing plates one by one...) But I like putting many plates here and clearing them
So I ordered it like this on purpose!
(+ Fresh oyster)
(+ Kimchi)
(+ Seasoned cabbage)
Oh, looks good
It suddenly feels like an authentic Korean food restaurant....
I like wrapping this with lettuce too
Wrap two pieces
Place kimchi on top
Kimchi is good too...
But how can seasoned cabbage be that good?

(They can even release seasoned cabbage bossam too) I'm eating more of it with seasoned cabbage
I think this combination is the most delicious
(What you need: A big mouth that can handle it) You have to have quite a big mouth
It doesn't go in well
Oh, the kimchi's really delicious
(True to the name, meat lover) But I am a meat lover
(She's not reaching for the kimchi comparably much...) Every time I eat bossam, there's kimchi left over
I think I'll have too much leftovers
I'll pack the rest to-go
I think there will be too much kimchi left over,
- so could you pack this for me early on? - Oh, sure!
Just the kimchi...!
(Packed the fresh oysters too)
I'll eat the packed kimchi with boiled pork at home, hehe
There's something called "Instant Pot"
It's kind of like a pressure rice cooker!

(Boiled pork is a related search of "Instant Pot") And that's great for making boiled pork
So I tried making it once,
and I enjoyed it so much!
(I'll make oyster ramyun with the oysters, hehe) Oyster ramyun is popular these days! I'll eat that too
(While she's eating, she's thinking about eating again at home) If you eat boiled pork with kimchi and then ramyun, wow!
With a cup of beer while watching a movie
So exciting
I was about to say something just now
What was it? I can't remember it at all...
What was it?!
(Trying to sync minds with the producer) ....Heh?
Kimchi!
I remembered!
I mean, I saw a comment...!
After I eat...
(Hygiene protector) they said I should stop wiping my mouth with my hands....

They begged me to fix the habit
(I'm trying...) so I'm using tissues
(It's a habit and it's hard to fix....) It became a habit to wipe like this
I think I did it a couple of times today too...!
(Old habits are dying hard)
(Environment protector) Now the comments are gonna say, "Save the tissues..."
(Confused) Then what do I do? Use my clothes?
Seriously, this seasoned cabbage
It's so good, I want to take some home
(Tzuyang is famous for being picky with veggies) I rarely eat any veggies
(The seasoned cabbage even captivated the picky eater) But if this cabbage is stacked up, I think I can eat it all
When I was young,
during winter,
I would actually
crave cold noodles...
and crave ice cream

(The temperature tolerance is slowly decreasing...) But now, I can't eat cold stuff in winter and I crave hot stuff
Hot soup is the best!
The meat is really big
It's 10 minutes before break time ends
and I feel like there will be a rush of customers when it's over
(Last piece)
(Done)
(Even cleared the soybean paste stew!)
(Safely cleared the time attack too) I ended it by 5
I love eating nice and hot bossam in winter
(It's still the cold winter these days) But I think it'll be good to make bossam at home with your family
I had a great meal once again
